_comment: Dubly ME — Phase D name/terminology glossary. Canonical Arabic→English spellings for recurring proper nouns so a character is never renamed mid-episode. The translation stage injects any entry whose 'ar' surface form (or a listed variant) appears in the current or previous line into the LLM prompt as a 'use this exact spelling' instruction. Curate per production; seeded from the first test-episode run.

names.note: Recurring character (uncle). ASR sometimes garbles as عمشاوق; earlier runs drifted between Shukry/Shawky.
Distinct from علي (Ali) — do NOT translate as Ali.
